c.d: The range and diversity of live streaming content available on the platform, including genres like sports, news, entertainment, and user-generated content.
The ease of navigation, design quality, and overall user experience provided by the app.
The monthly or annual fee required to access the platform's content.
The range of devices (e.g., smartphones, tablets, smart TVs, gaming consoles) on which the app can be used.
The availability and breadth of live sports events streamed on the platform.
